task_completion.description: Start a Synthetic (Cyton) board session in the OpenBCI GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenBCI GUI is open and the system status or control panel indicates that a 'Synthetic' or 'Cyton' session is active.

task_completion.description: Configure the interface to a 2-panel vertical layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main workspace of the OpenBCI GUI is split into exactly two panels, one on top of the other.

task_completion.description: Display the 'Time Series' widget in the top panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top panel has the header/title 'Time Series' and displays waveform graphs.

task_completion.description: Display the 'Accelerometer' widget in the bottom panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom panel has the header/title 'Accelerometer' and displays XYZ acceleration graphs.

task_completion.description: Ensure both widgets are displaying live data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Data traces are visible in both the Time Series and Accelerometer panels, and the GUI shows a 'Stop Data Stream' button (or similar indicator that streaming is active).

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the configuration to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or GUI notification shows that a screenshot named 'accel_layout.png' was saved in '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenBCI GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenBCI GUI interface being manipulated (dropdowns, buttons clicked), rather than just a static image or text editor.

integrity.description: The screenshot was not created using an image editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No image editing software (like GIMP) is open or used to fake the final layout.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI configuration by just copying a pre-existing image to the target path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent actually configuring the layout and widgets before the screenshot is saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/accel_layout.png'. The layout must be a 2-panel vertical split (one top, one bottom). The top panel must show the 'Time Series' widget, and the bottom panel must show the 'Accelerometer' widget. The data source must be 'Synthetic (Cyton)'.
